---
title: "Analiza tekstu i chmury słów"
author: "Projekt analizy tekstu"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_float: true
    number_sections: true
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo = TRUE,
  warning = FALSE,
  message = FALSE,
  fig.width = 10,
  fig.height = 7,
  fig.align = "center"
)
```

# Instalacja i ładowanie pakietów

```{r}
# install.packages(c("tm","wordcloud","RColorBrewer","ggplot2","knitr"))

library(tm)
library(wordcloud)
library(RColorBrewer)
library(ggplot2)
library(knitr)
```

# Funkcje

## Funkcja przetwarzania tekstu

```{r}
process_text <- function(file_path) {

  text <- tolower(readLines(file_path, encoding = "UTF-8", warn = FALSE))

  text <- removePunctuation(text)
  text <- removeNumbers(text)

  text <- removeWords(text, stopwords("en"))

  words <- unlist(strsplit(text, "\\s+"))

  words <- words[words != ""]

  return(words)
}
```

## Funkcja obliczania częstości słów

```{r}
word_frequency <- function(words) {

  freq <- table(words)

  freq_df <- data.frame(
    word = names(freq),
    freq = as.numeric(freq)
  )

  freq_df <- freq_df[order(-freq_df$freq), ]
  rownames(freq_df) <- NULL

  return(freq_df)
}
```

## Funkcja tworzenia chmury słów

```{r}
plot_wordcloud <- function(freq_df, title_text, color_palette = "Dark2") {

  wordcloud(
    words = freq_df$word,
    freq = freq_df$freq,
    min.freq = 16,
    colors = brewer.pal(8, color_palette)
  )

  title(title_text)
}
```

# Analiza jednego pliku

```{r}
file_path <- "C:/Users/48606/Desktop/PSI/Biden2021.txt"

file_name <- basename(file_path)

words <- process_text(file_path)

freq_df <- word_frequency(words)

plot_wordcloud(freq_df, paste("Chmura słów -", file_name))

kable(head(freq_df,10), caption = paste("Najczęstsze słowa -", file_name))
```

# Usuwanie dodatkowych stop words

```{r}
custom_stopwords <- c("—","–","’s","’re")

words <- words[!words %in% custom_stopwords]

freq_df <- word_frequency(words)

plot_wordcloud(freq_df, paste("Chmura słów po usunięciu dodatkowych stopwords -", file_name))

kable(head(freq_df,10), caption = paste("Najczęstsze słowa po czyszczeniu -", file_name))
```

# Analiza dwóch plików jednocześnie

```{r}
file_paths <- c(
"C:/Users/48606/Desktop/PSI/Biden2021.txt",
"C:/Users/48606/Desktop/PSI/Biden2024.txt"
)

for(file_path in file_paths){

  file_name <- basename(file_path)

  words <- process_text(file_path)

  freq_df <- word_frequency(words)

  plot_wordcloud(freq_df, paste("Chmura słów -", file_name))

  print(kable(
    head(freq_df,10),
    caption = paste("Najczęstsze słowa -", file_name)
  ))
}
```

# Analiza dwóch plików z dodatkowymi stop words

```{r}
custom_stopwords <- c("—","–","’s","’re")

for(file_path in file_paths){

  file_name <- basename(file_path)

  words <- process_text(file_path)

  words <- words[!words %in% custom_stopwords]

  freq_df <- word_frequency(words)

  plot_wordcloud(freq_df, paste("Chmura słów po czyszczeniu -", file_name))

  print(kable(
    head(freq_df,10),
    caption = paste("Najczęstsze słowa po czyszczeniu -", file_name)
  ))
}
```
